whatsNew: Changed the fixed information button to a solid high-contrast colour so it remains visible over white content.

Rebuilt CSCS Easy, Medium and Hard tests around scenario-based control decisions and close technical distractors.
Rebuilt all ten in-house assessments with challenging workplace scenarios and topic-specific distractors.
